welcome.title: Welcome to Tracklyze
welcome.subtitle: Your competitor intelligence platform. We'll help you set up in just a few minutes.

monitoring.title: Competitor Monitoring
monitoring.desc: Import and analyze competitor campaigns automatically

tracking.title: Competitive Tracking
tracking.desc: Monitor rivals' messaging, offers, and strategies

insights.title: AI Insights
insights.desc: Get strategic recommendations from your competitive data

workspace.title: Create your workspace
workspace.subtitle: A workspace organizes your team's competitive intelligence
workspace.label: Workspace name
workspace.hint: Typically your company or team name
workspace.errorRls: Something went wrong. Please try signing out and back in.
workspace.errorDuplicate: A workspace with that name already exists.

competitors.title: Add your competitors
competitors.subtitle: Who are you tracking? You can always add more later.

gmail.title: Connect Gmail
gmail.subtitle: Automatically import competitor newsletters from your inbox

readOnly.title: Read-only access
readOnly.desc: We never send emails or modify your inbox

smartClassification.title: Smart classification
smartClassification.desc: AI identifies newsletters vs regular emails

disconnect.title: Disconnect anytime
disconnect.desc: Revoke access from settings whenever you want

gmail.askAdmin: Ask a workspace admin to connect Gmail
gmail.verifyFirst: Verify your email before connecting Gmail.

import.title: Import your first data
import.subtitle: Choose how to get competitor data into the platform

gmailSync.title: Gmail sync
gmailSync.desc: If you connected Gmail, competitor communications will appear automatically in your inbox
gmailSync.label: Continue

pasteContent.title: Paste competitor content
pasteContent.desc: Manually paste competitor email or campaign content for immediate analysis
pasteContent.label: Import data

insights.title: You're all set!
insights.subtitle: Your workspace is ready. As data flows in, AI will generate insights, alerts, and strategic recommendations automatically.

bullets.insights: AI insights generated from competitor patterns
